# Virtual Card Payment Report

This report is only applicable if the Cash Management module is installed and your company is using Comdata.
Use this screen to print a report of your Comdata Virtual Card payment history.
View the [Comdata Virtual Card Processing Guide](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/f496dede-a1cf-45dd-8801-2ec78df6bb57?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DBDeVzTIUSffYuLisLH_7bC-HQ89sukwLWWT1oGTaQA&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Comdata_Virtual_Card_Processing_rev0619.pdf%22).
